question.content: For the same air-compression refrigeration cycle assumptions, compute expander theoretical specific work for both no-regeneration and regeneration cases. Output exactly two decimal numbers separated by one comma as no_regen,regen, plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no percent sign, no fraction, no equation form, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Use expansion-state temperatures from each case to evaluate turbine specific work.
step_1.key_point: Expansion-state temperatures from each case to evaluate turbine specific work.

step_3.content: Analyze panel 1 of 2 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_3.key_point: Set up the relation for expander specific work in both cases.

step_5.content: Return the two values in no_regen,regen order.
step_5.key_point: Return the two values in no_regen,regen order.
